channel.title: itch.io Charity Bundles — Opportunities
channel.description: Auto-collected posts and jams related to charity/fundraisers on itch.io (fresh-only).

item.title: [JAMS] itch.io
item.description: Investigative Journalism Game Jam by Floodlight Gaming Hosted by animainteractive 1 Joined Overview Community Submissions open from 2026-04-07 16:00:00 to 2026-05-08 06:59:59 Starts in years months days hours minutes seconds Join jam What if you could turn real-world investigatio
